# Marwa Twin Landing Page Setup

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Project structure created with React + Tailwind CSS
  - React components for Header, Hero, Services, Footer
  - Tailwind CSS configuration with custom emerald and gold theme
  - Vite configuration for fast development

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created complete project structure with Vite and React
  - Configured Tailwind CSS with custom theme colors
  - Set up responsive design with mobile-first approach
  - All content in French as requested

- [ ] Install dependencies and compile
  - Run `npm install` to install all dependencies
  - Verify project compiles without errors

- [ ] Create and run dev server
  - Run `npm run dev` to start the development server
  - Project will open automatically in browser at http://localhost:5173

## Project Features

✨ **Design & Style:**
- Luxurious, professional, and elegant aesthetic
- Deep emerald green (#023020) as primary color
- Rich gold (#D4AF37) accents
- Premium UI/UX with modern components

🎯 **Structure:**
1. **Header** - Navigation menu with calligraphic "Marwa Twin" logo
2. **Hero Section** - Catchy title, subtitle, and CTA buttons
3. **Services Section** - Elegant cards showcasing:
   - Onglerie: Manucure & Nail Art
   - Coiffure: Brushing, Plate Smoothing, Highlights
4. **Footer** - Contact info, location (Tiflet), Instagram link, WhatsApp button

📱 **Responsive Design:**
- Mobile-first approach
- Works perfectly on all device sizes
- Touch-friendly interface

🌐 **Full French Content**
- All text and UI elements in French
- Location: Tiflet, Morocco
- Social links: Instagram @marwa_anbar____
- WhatsApp contact button for reservations
